name: Delta SkyMiles® Reserve Business American Express Card

welcome_offer.description: Limited-time offer: Earn 125,000 Bonus Miles after spending $15,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 7/15/2026.
notes: Official Amex business page is canonical for the public limited-time headline offer: up to 125,000 Bonus Miles after $15,000 in purchases in the first 6 months; offer ends 7/15/2026.

Delta news/source evidence describes the campaign as a tiered/additional-bonus structure (100,000 base miles plus 25,000 additional miles). Keep this tiered context in review metadata so the offer is not mistaken for an unconditional non-tiered lump-sum source pattern.
No source conflicts observed for the final 125,000-mile public limited-time offer.

2026-07-13 review: KC approved proactive update path; existing elevated Delta 7/15/2026 public limited-time offer values were already present in OpenCard data, so this pass refreshes verification metadata rather than changing the headline offer.

earning_rates.notes: On eligible transit purchases; miles caps apply
On eligible U.S. shipping purchases; miles caps apply
On eligible U.S. office supply store purchases; miles caps apply

lounge_access.other: 15 Delta Sky Club visits each Medallion Year; complimentary Centurion Lounge/Escape Lounge access when flying Delta and purchasing the flight with the Card; terms apply

other_benefits: First checked bag free on Delta flights
Companion Certificate each year upon renewal (domestic First Class or ComfortPlus)
Second checked bag free on domestic Delta-operated flights
Companion Certificate can be redeemed toward the eligible flight portion of a Delta Vacations package where applicable
Companion Certificate can be redeemed toward the eligible flight portion of a Delta Vacations package

sources.notes: Delta News Hub official announcement: limited-time welcome offers and 2026 benefit updates

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20/month statement credit on eligible U.S. Resy purchases. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month statement credit on U.S. rideshare purchases (select providers). Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: Delta Stays Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $250 annual statement credit on prepaid Delta Stays bookings on delta.com.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
